data.title: Asia Morning Briefing: ETH Bulls Eye $3K as Validator Backbone Upgrade Rolls In
data.description:
• Ethereum is gaining favor in the markets, with ETH trading close to $2500 and outperforming Bitcoin due to bullish headlines and regulatory clarity for stablecoins.
  • Ethereum's validator architecture is evolving with distributed validator technology, enhancing security and decentralization, which appeals to institutional investors.
  • Coinbase shares have surged, raising concerns of overvaluation, with 10x Research suggesting a short COIN/long BTC trade due to excessive speculation.

data.title: Bitcoin Jumps After Trump Says Growth Will Offset Deficits, Boosting Bull Case for BTC and Gold
data.description:
• BTC gained 0.54% over the past 24 hours, rising to $107,937 with support at $107,300.
  • Trump’s June 29 message urging GOP lawmakers to ignore deficit concerns drew analyst praise for BTC.
  • Technical action showed a descending channel before recovering toward $108K late in the session.

data.title: BNB Hovers Above $648 as Maxwell Hard Fork Upgrade Set to Double Block Production Speed
data.description:
• BNB closed at $648.37, trimming earlier intraday gains to end flat on the day.
  • The token continues to consolidate below $651 resistance ahead of the Maxwell hard fork.
  • Market attention is focused on the June 30 upgrade, which will double BSC’s block speed.

data.title: Ondo Finance: ‘2025 Will Be the Year of Tokenized Stocks’
data.description:
• ONDO climbed 1.5% to $0.7671, breaking above key resistance on moderate volume.
  • Price action formed a bullish channel, with support established at $0.755.
  • Ondo Finance launched a global industry alliance on June 17 to promote standards for tokenized securities.

data.title: Coinbase Outpaces S&P 500 With 43% June Rise as Stablecoin Narrative Grows: CNBC
data.description:
• Coinbase's shares have risen 43% in June, making it the top performer in the S&P 500 index.
  • The company's stock performance has been boosted by progress on the GENIUS Act, which could increase revenue for Coinbase through stablecoin-related income.
  • Coinbase's relationship with Circle, the issuer of USDC, gives it indirect exposure to Circle's revenue, analysts said.

data.title: Robinhood Launches Micro Bitcoin, Solana and XRP Futures Contracts
data.description:
• Robinhood has introduced micro futures on bitcoin, solana, and XRP in the US.
  • The launch is part of Robinhood's growing crypto offerings, which have seen significant growth following the company's recent acquisitions of Bitstamp and WonderFi.
  • Its crypto notional volumes reached $11.7 billion in May, a 36% month-over-month and 65% year-over-year increase.

data.title: Why is XRP Up Today? Trio of Catalysts Sees Token Outperform Wider Crypto Market
data.description:
• XRP's price climbed 5.5% to $2.19 in the last 24 hours, outperforming the wider cryptocurrency market.
  • The launch of XRP micro futures on Robinhood, which offer traders more flexibility, was one catalyst, along with the withdrawal of Ripple's cross-appeal in the SEC lawsuit.
  • On-chain data also supported the price increase, with the XRP Ledger logging over 1.1 million active addresses in the past week.

data.title: Bitcoin Treasury Corp Boosts Holdings to 771 BTC, Plans Lending After $51M Buy
data.description:
• Bitcoin Treasury Corporation has completed the first phase of its bitcoin buying campaign, purchasing another 478.57 BTC for $51 million.
  • The acquisition brings the company's total holdings to 771.37 BTC.
  • The company's bitcoin holdings now represent approximately 0.0000634 BTC per fully diluted share, and it plans to lend part of its BTC treasury to trading desks and other counterparties.

data.title: Gemini Rolls Out Tokenized Stocks in EU, Starting With Strategy Shares
data.description:
• Gemini said Friday it launched tokenized stock trading for EU customers.
  • The first tokenized shares available are of Strategy (MSTR), with more stocks and ETFs to follow.
  • Trading platforms are increasingly eye tokenization to expand offerings.

data.title: Anchorage to Phase Out USDC, Agora USD Citing Risks, Stirring Fierce Backlash
data.description:
• Anchorage Digital said it's phasing out support for certain stablecoins, citing concentration and security risks and will direct clients to convert USDC into rival token USDG.
  • Critics alleged the move is misleading and self-serving, with Anchorage being part of the consortium behind USDG.
  • The controversy comes at a time when firms are jockeying for position in the rapidly-growing stablecoin sector as regulation advances in the U.S.
